== Notes for [[Item:Q104627|Q104627]] ==

7. CAPTAIN ANTONIO3 DE MORALES-TREVINO (JUANA2 DE TREVINO-QUINTANILLA-Y-SALAZAR, PEDRO1 DE SALAZAR)
*was born in Saltillo, Coahulia, Mexico.
*He married MARIA RODRIGUEZ-DE-MONTEMAYOR 10 Jun 1654 in Monterrey, Nuevo Leon, Mexico,
**daughter of MIGUEL DEL CANTO-MONTEMAYOR and MONICA RODRIGUEZ-TREVINO. She was born 1628 in Monterrey, Nuevo Leon, Mexico.

Source:Index to the Marriage Investigations of the Diocese of Guadalajara, by Raul J. Guerra., Nadine M. Vasquez, Baldomero Vela, Jr. Page 269.

Child of ANTONIO DE MORALES-TREVINO and MARIA RODRIGUEZ-DE-MONTEMAYOR is:
* 36. i. MARIA-JUANA4 DE MORALES, b. Monterrey, Nuevo Leon, Mexico; d. 08 Aug 1689.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/salazar.htm

====================

CAPTAIN ANTONIO DE MORALES-TREVINO 10 Jun 1654 in Monterrey, Nuevo Leon, Mexico, son of LUIS RAMON-DE-MORALES and JUANA DE TREVINO-QUINTANILLA-Y-SALAZAR. He was born in Saltillo, Coahuila, Mexico.

http://www.somosprimos.com/inclan/albertocanto.htm

===============

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014428198773

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
